name: skill-creator
title: Skill Creator
description: Use this OS operator skill when creating, migrating, editing, validating, or reviewing opensaas/Consuelo OS skills. It turns skill workflows into repo-backed skill folders, skill.json metadata, migration fixtures, replacement allowlists, registry generation, install seeding, and tests, with exact-copy guardrails unless Ko explicitly approves a rewrite.
